# eaccess auth

> session-first express auth with admin ui, mfa, roles, oauth, and multi-tenant-friendly user mapping

Express authentication middleware for PostgreSQL sessions. Provides registration, login, roles, MFA, OAuth providers, remember-me, and an admin UI. Maps to your own user table via optional user_id.


## Getting Started

- [Home](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/index.md): project overview and core principles
- [Quick Start](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/quick-start/index.md): installation and basic setup

## Core Concepts

- [Overview](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/index.md): fundamentals
- [Sessions & Resync](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/sessions/index.md): sessions and resync
- [Registration & Confirmation](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/registration/index.md): registration and confirmation
- [Authentication & MFA](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/authentication/index.md): login flows and MFA
- [Roles](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/roles/index.md): roles and permissions
- [Multi-Tenant Mapping](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/multi-tenant/index.md): mapping user_id for external tenants
- [OAuth Providers](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/providers/index.md): oauth providers
- [Standalone Auth](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/concepts/standalone/index.md): standalone auth without express context

## Guides

- [Express Middleware](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/guides/express-middleware/index.md): using the middleware
- [Admin UI](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/guides/admin-ui/index.md): running the admin ui
- [MFA Patterns](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/guides/mfa/index.md): 2fa setup and ux patterns

## API Reference

- [Reference](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/api/index.md): api surface overview
- [Errors](https://nvms.github.io/eaccess/api/errors/index.md): comprehensive list of errors thrown. when and why
